## Security checklist
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, passwords, or production IDs in the diff
- [ ] No raw internal errors newly exposed to clients
- [ ] Auth / rate-limit behavior considered if applicable
- [ ] Disguise / panel path behavior does not leak admin routes

- [ ] Installer still works on: Linux / macOS / Windows (if touched)
